description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a dark, gabled roof and a spacious front lawn. The front facade features a covered porch with white railings and several columns, providing a welcoming entrance. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light inside. The attached garage is positioned to the left of the main entrance, with a driveway leading up to it and a car parked outside. The rear of the house includes a patio area and what appears to be a hot tub or small pool. The exterior walls are clad in dark siding, contrasting with the lighter trim and roof.
description: A single-story, dark-sided bungalow with a gabled roof, covered front porch, attached garage, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, attached garage, driveway, and a car parked outside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, multiple windows, and the transition from the garage to the main living area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio area, a hot tub or small pool, and the extended roofline.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows and the driveway extending from the garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
